arts.ttl: Goretzka stars as Bayern stretches Bundesliga lead to 7 points with win over Wolfsburg
arts.sum: Leon Goretzka scored twice for Bayern Munich as it beat Wolfsburg 3-2 to open a seven-point lead in the Bundesliga on Saturday. Leipzig squandered a three-goal lead at last-place Bochum as Myron Boadu scored a second-half hat trick for the home team.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich 3-2 Wolfsburg: Player ratings as Goretzka fires hosts seven points clear
arts.sum: Player ratings from Bayern Munich's Bundesliga clash with Wolfsburg.

arts.ttl: Bayern beat Wolfsburg to go clear in Bundesliga
arts.sum: Leon Goretzka scored once in each half to help Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich to a 3-2 victory over visiting VfL Wolfsburg on Saturday.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Bayern Munich 3-2 Wolfsburg – the Leon Goretzka show
arts.sum: Bayern Munich moved seven points clear of Bayer Leverkusen with a 3-2 win against Wolfsburg on Saturday afternoon, but Vincent Kompany’s side were made to work for their win. Leon…

arts.ttl: Report: Sven Ulreich contemplating Bayern Munich future
arts.sum: Bayern Munich goalkeeper Sven Ulreich is reportedly contemplating his future with the club. Sven Ulreich is still considering whether to stay at Bayern next season as #3.

arts.ttl: Lens submit offer to sign Bayern Munich’s Daniel Peretz
arts.sum: According to Florian Plettenberg, RC Lens have submitted an official offer to sign Daniel Peretz (24) from Bayern Munich in the January transfer window. The Ligue 1 club have identified the…

arts.ttl: Report: Max Eberl’s hardline, stance, Alphonso Davies’ desire to stay at Bayern Munich have overpowered agent’s demands
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport1’s Kerry Hau, Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl took a handline stance with the agent for Alphonso Davies, Nick Huoseh, and refused to get duped about what other offers might be out there. In addition, Davies has a strong desire to stay, which might have also played a role in Huoseh backing off negotiating tactics that might have caused tension this week:

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku agrees personal terms with Bayern Munich as negotiations with Chelsea continue
arts.sum: According to Florian Plettenberg, Chelsea attacking midfielder Christopher Nkunku (27) has agreed personal terms to join Bayern Munich. The France international wants to return to Germany after failing to cement a…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Wolfsburg: Live stream, game time thread, how to watch
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. A look at the rosters and injuries for Wolfsburg and Bayern Munich .

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich sporting director organized team ski trip during the Winterpause
arts.sum: This time around, several rounds of coach and executive sackings later, Bayern went on a ski trip as a team after the recent friendly vs. of FC Bayern went on a ski trip to Obertauern with an overnight stay after the Salzburg game.
